diarized_transcript:
[Agent] Thank you for calling Genshin Impact Player Support, this is Maya. How can I help?
[Caller] I got an email saying someone logged into my account from Brazil. I'm in Japan and I never travel. I'm freaking out.
[Agent] I completely understand — that kind of alert is alarming. The good news is we caught it and you called right away, which is exactly the right move. Let's lock this down together. Could you share your UID?
[Caller] 832458917.
[Agent] Thank you, Kaito. I see the account. For verification, I'll send a one-time code to your email on file. Read back the six digits when you see it.
[Caller] OK, I got it. 391746.
[Agent] Verified. Now let me look at login activity. I see your normal Japan-based sessions, and yes — one login attempt from Sao Paulo three hours ago on a browser we haven't seen before. The session is still active. I'm going to take three actions right now. First, terminating that suspicious session immediately. Second, forcing a global sign-out across every device. Third, requiring a password reset on your next login.
[Caller] Please do it.
[Agent] Done, done, and done. Your account is secure as of this moment. I'm sending a password reset link to your email — valid for 30 minutes. While you reset, let me check what was accessed. Looking at activity during that session... no purchases, no primogem spend, no character or artifact changes, no gift transfers. They got in but didn't have time to do anything before the auto-flag kicked in.
[Caller] Oh thank goodness. I've spent a lot on this account.
[Agent] I see that — you're a valued long-time player, and we take this seriously. Two strong recommendations: one, enable two-factor authentication today if you haven't; two, check if that password is reused on any other site and change it everywhere. I'll email you both guides along with a security checkup summary for your records.
[Caller] Yes, please. Thank you for catching this so fast.
[Agent] That's what we're here for, Kaito. If you see anything else unusual in the next few days, call back immediately and reference ticket number that I'll include in the email. Anything else?
[Caller] No, that's everything. Thank you, Maya.
[Agent] Take care, Kaito. Stay safe out there.
